  (∀ (α : Type _) [Semiring α], IsCancelMulZero α ↔ IsDomain α ∨ Subsingleton α) := by
  sorry

theorem procedural_RingAut_coe_pow_0f1107dd7159 : (∀ {R : Type _} [Ring R] {a b : R} [Invertible a] [Invertible b] [Invertible (a + b)] (h : ⅟(a + b) = ⅟a + ⅟b),
    a * ⅟b * a = b * ⅟a * b) →
  ((∀ {R : Type _} [Mul R] [Add R] (f : R ≃+* R) (n : ℕ), ⇑(f ^ n) = (⇑f)^[n]) ∧
    (∀ {R : Type _} {S : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring R] [NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring S] (f : R →+ S),
      (∀ (x y : R), f (x * y) = f x * f y) ↔ AddMonoidHom.mul.compr₂ f = (AddMonoidHom.mul.comp f).compl₂ f)) := by
  sorry
